reference: Hi. This can be a small abscess or a hemangioma. It can be a pyogenic granuloma. It is better to take a course of antibiotics for three days and see the results. If it is recurrent, it is better to have it surgically removed.
text: Hi. This can be a small abscess or a hemangioma. It can be a pyogenic reagent. It is better to take the course of the antibiotics in the three days and see the results. If it is recurrent, it is better to have it surgically removed.
